segments.text: You have rejected us, O God; You have broken us; You have been angry; restore us!
You have shaken the land and torn it open. Heal its fractures, for it is quaking.
You have shown Your people hardship; we are staggered from the wine You made us drink.
You have raised a banner for those who fear You, that they may flee the bow. [^138] Selah
Respond and save us with Your right hand, that Your beloved may be delivered.
God has spoken from His sanctuary:[^139]
I will triumph! I will parcel out Shechem and apportion the Valley of Succoth.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Gilead is Mine, and Manasseh is Mine; Ephraim is My helmet, Judah is My scepter.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Moab is My washbasin; upon Edom I toss My sandal; 
over Philistia I shout in triumph.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Who will bring me to the fortified city? Who will lead me to Edom?
Have You not rejected us, O God? Will You no longer march out, O God, with our armies?
Give us aid against the enemy, for the help of man is worthless.
With God we will perform with valor, and He will trample our enemies.
